positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest grove at twilight. The central focus is a winding path leading to a massive, bioluminescent glowing tree with intricate, crystalline roots and branches. The background features stylized, geometric mountain silhouettes and softly glowing floating lanterns. Color palette: deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant amethyst, and pops of glowing gold. Style: Art Nouveau meets clean vector illustration, with sharp lines and bold silhouettes. Composition: Central, perfectly balanced symmetry, designed to wrap around a collar or chest area. Lighting: Strong rim lighting on the foliage, emitting a soft, magical glow. Highly detailed, suitable for screen printing or DTG apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, amateur, muted, messy, cluttered, cartoonish, gradients, photo-realistic
